task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the OSCAR EMR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR main dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating successful login (expected user: oscardoc).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the vaccine/prevention lot management area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen, dialog, or menu specifically for managing 'Prevention', 'Immunization', or 'Vaccine Lots' is open in the OSCAR EMR interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct vaccine type was selected or entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Influenza' is visible in the vaccine type, prevention name, or immunization selection field.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct Lot Number was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'FL2025-X9' is entered into the Lot Number input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct Expiry Date was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date '2026-12-31' is entered into the Expiry Date input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the lot is set to be active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Active' checkbox is checked, or a status dropdown is set to 'Active' for the new lot.

task_completion.description: Verify the new vaccine lot was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success/confirmation message is displayed, or the newly added lot 'FL2025-X9' with expiry '2026-12-31' is visible in the saved list/table of existing vaccine lots.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Interactions occur within a web browser showing the OSCAR EMR interface. There should be no terminal windows showing direct MySQL database inserts or curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs 'Influenza', 'FL2025-X9', and '2026-12-31' must be entered into the actual OSCAR EMR web forms, not a text editor, notepad, or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the save action was performed in the genuine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final confirmation or list view appears to be the authentic OSCAR EMR interface reacting to a form submission, rather than a manipulated local HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires adding a vaccine lot in OSCAR EMR. Target Vaccine Type: 'Influenza'. Target Lot Number: 'FL2025-X9'. Target Expiry Date: '2026-12-31'. The lot must be marked as active and saved. The agent must log in using Username: 'oscardoc', Password: 'oscar', PIN: '1117'.
